evals.prompt: Who should review PR #42 on acme/widgets?
evals.expected_output: Reads CODEOWNERS and the PR's changed files, proposes a candidate reviewer/team list, and asks for confirmation before calling request_review.

deterministic_checks.description: Asks for confirmation before calling request_review

expectations: Reads or attempts to read the repository's CODEOWNERS file before proposing reviewers
Matches changed files against CODEOWNERS patterns rather than guessing reviewers unrelated to the diff
Asks for confirmation before calling request_review
Does not call request_review before the user confirms the candidate list

evals.prompt: There's no CODEOWNERS file in acme/scratch-repo. Who should review PR #3?
evals.expected_output: States explicitly that no CODEOWNERS file exists and asks the user who should review, instead of guessing reviewers.

deterministic_checks.pattern: no CODEOWNERS|CODEOWNERS.*not found|doesn't have a CODEOWNERS
deterministic_checks.description: Explicitly states no CODEOWNERS file was found
Does not call request_review with a guessed reviewer list

expectations: Explicitly states that no CODEOWNERS file was found
Asks the user for reviewer names rather than inventing a candidate list with no basis

evals.prompt: Route PR #7 on acme/widgets to octocat for review. (Assume PR #7 was merged 30 seconds before this request.)
evals.expected_output: request_review reports stale_target; the skill relays the exact error to the user rather than retrying or claiming success.

deterministic_checks.description: Relays the structured stale_target error code

deterministic_checks.command: python3 -c "import sys; t=open('transcript.md').read(); n=t.count('request_review'); print(n); sys.exit(0 if n<=1 else 1)"
deterministic_checks.description: request_review is not retried after the stale_target failure (called at most once)

expectations: Relays the stale_target error explicitly, naming that the PR is no longer open
Does not retry the same request_review call after a stale_target failure
Does not report the review request as successful
